goals.title: PER-52 P6-T01 voice state not persisted as joined. Acceptance: app re...
goals.objective: PER-52 P6-T01 voice state not persisted as joined. Acceptance: app restart/load must derive joined state only from an active backend media session; stale persisted voice_session or voice_channel active_context must not restore as joined. Scope: backend/Tauri state persistence and focused restart regression evidence; do not add device selection, media signaling bridge, group fanout, overlay, or UX polish.
goals.evidence: Local implementation and verification passed: added stale_persisted_joined_voice_session_is_cleared_on_restart in apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs plus .omx/plans/P6-T01-voice-state-not-persisted-joined-2026-06-20.md. Post-cleanup checks passed: targeted desktop backend restart test, cargo fmt --check, git diff --check. AI slop cleanup found no new masking fallback in the added test. Blocker: this session exposes no native task tool or .codex/agents for independent code-reviewer and architect lanes; tool discovery exposed GitHub review tools only. Per Ultragoal final gate, independent review unavailable blocks marking aggregate goal complete.

goals.title: PER-53 audio device selection
goals.objective: Implement PER-53 P6-T02 audio input/output selector enumeration and persisted preferences with backend/native plus UI smoke evidence. Preserve backend-derived voice session truth and do not broaden into mute/VAD, signaling bridge, loopback smoke, or group voice.
goals.evidence: Multica PER-53 assigned scope: audio device selection; metadata requires enumeration, input/output preference persistence, fail-closed unavailable behavior, Rust/Tauri/media tests, and Playwright or harness smoke.

goals.title: PER-56 provider-signaled voice media bridge
goals.objective: Implement PER-56 P6-T05 two-person media signaling bridge: sealed voice offer/candidate/native media proof signals must traverse a provider-signaled WebRTC text/control runtime, not manual copy. Preserve provider-as-signaling-only and do not expand into mute/VAD, volume, group overlay, or broader release gates.
goals.evidence: QA rejection fixes: normal all-targets/clippy compile passes without transport harness export leakage; production-copy/honesty/G128 gates pass; PER-56 plan verification command corrected; WebDriver script now records provider-runtime pump evidence path and classifies manual command bridge as non-PER56 fallback; WebDriver run remains blocked by missing DISPLAY/WAYLAND_DISPLAY with manifest at target/per56-g012-native-voice/tauri-webdriver-integrated-manifest.json.

goals.title: PER-56 native WebDriver evidence or waiver
goals.objective: Resolve PER-56 final verification blocker after QA re-test: provide a display-capable Tauri WebDriver/two-profile native proof for PR head 8e0a29a36c9320573a76f7837b30337d6b1294e3 showing provider-signaled runtime traversal for voice signaling, or obtain architect-level waiver/reclassification that the green Rust/Tauri harness plus CI evidence is sufficient despite the original WebDriver requirement.
goals.evidence: QA re-test on 2026-06-20 confirms code gates and CI are green, but QA rejected because required native WebDriver proof remains unavailable. Engineer fresh attempt wrote target/per56-g012-native-voice-engineer-retest/tauri-webdriver-integrated-manifest.json with status failed-preflight: no DISPLAY/WAYLAND_DISPLAY, missing WebKitGTK/JSC 4.1 pkg-config packages, missing native WebDriver binary, and no built app binary before preflight.

goals.title: PER-57 mute VAD speaking
goals.objective: Implement PER-57 P6-T06 mute/VAD/speaking: backend self-mute must toggle only an active voice session; speaking indicators must derive from media-level/VAD events or backend remote-media evidence, not UI optimism. Preserve provider-as-signaling-only and do not expand into volume controls, loopback release smoke, group overlay, or broader release gates.
goals.evidence: Implemented PER-57 fail-closed self-mute and backend-evidence-only speaking UI boundaries. Changed apps/desktop/src-tauri/src/lib.rs, apps/ui/src/main.tsx, apps/ui/tests/e2e/stateful-ui.spec.ts, and .omx/plans/P6-T06-mute-vad-speaking-2026-06-20.md. Passed cargo fmt --check, git diff --check, jq goals validation, and targeted discrypt-media mute_control and voice_activity_detector tests; desktop/UI integration commands are blocked in this runtime by disk and missing node_modules.
